key_deviations.note: Wheel = sigstore keyless (via GH Actions OIDC); Docker = cosign keyless (sigstore-family). GPG 排除（key ceremony 与 custos non-custodial age 定位冲突）
gateway-contract 用 JSON Schema 而非 OpenAPI —— CustosGateway 传输面是 NATS + Rust trait, 非 REST HTTP, OpenAPI HTTP-shape 不匹配
保持 0.x LTS 起点; Plan 12 交付 0.2.0; 1.0.0 promote 判据 defer 到 arx-79 wire ready 后 (upgrade-path.md checklist)
script entry name 占位 'custos' (Plan 12), 由 Plan 11 lock; 若 Plan 11 选 arx-runner, T9 联动改 pyproject + Dockerfile + docs (lesson #35 boundary-constant fanout)
arx 侧 client 用 PEP 440 '~=0.2' pin; 允许 patch + minor additive, 禁自动升 major; arx-79 wire 承接 v1 → v2 fanout
所有 LTS 承诺项 (EOL / SLA / cadence / deprecation grace / backport) 均有 audit-non-silence 挂钩 (CHANGELOG + Release notes + Security Advisory), 兑现 CLAUDE.md §5 红线
